activities_projects.title: Calculating Shadow Length Using Geometry
activities_projects.objective: Apply trigonometry to determine shadow lengths
steps: Measure angle of elevation of sun using protractor
Measure height of stick
Calculate expected shadow length using tan θ = height/shadow length
Compare with actual shadow length
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands relation between shadow, object height, and sun angle mathematically

activities_projects.title: Focal Point Determination of Concave Mirror
activities_projects.objective: Measure focal length of a concave mirror
steps: Place screen in front of mirror
Direct mirror toward distant object
Move screen to get sharpest image
Measure distance between mirror and screen (focal length)
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands focal length and converging properties of concave mirrors

activities_projects.title: Exploring Convex Mirror Field of View
activities_projects.objective: Study image formation and magnification in convex mirrors
steps: Place objects at varying distances from mirror
Observe image size and clarity
Record how image appears smaller as object moves away
Sketch observations
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands divergent nature and reduced image formation in convex mirrors

activities_projects.title: Designing a Functional Periscope with Measured Angles
activities_projects.objective: Apply geometry and reflection laws in real-life device
steps: Cut holes on opposite sides of box
Position mirrors at calculated 45° angles using protractor
Look through periscope to observe object indirectly
Adjust mirror angles to optimize image
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies laws of reflection and geometric reasoning in practical setup
activities_projects.evaluation: Periscope works with correct mirror angles (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Multiple Light Source Shadow Analysis
steps: Place object in front of screen
Shine torches at known angles
Measure angles of resulting shadows
Analyze shadow positions and overlaps mathematically
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects multiple light sources to shadow geometry
activities_projects.evaluation: Accurate angle measurement and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Investigating Image Formation by Curved Mirrors
activities_projects.objective: Compare real and virtual images using concave and convex mirrors
steps: Form image on screen using concave mirror (real image)
Observe virtual image by looking into concave mirror from close distance
Observe virtual image using convex mirror
Sketch and compare images for size, orientation, and type
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Distinguishes between real and virtual images and their properties
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct identification, observation, and sketching (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Angle of Reflection and Critical Thinking
activities_projects.objective: Predict and verify reflected light paths
steps: Draw incident ray on paper
Predict reflected ray using law of reflection
Shine laser and verify predicted angle
Discuss errors and possible improvements
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies law of reflection in predictive scenarios

activities_projects.title: Real-life Applications: Designing a Mini Kaleidoscope
steps: Arrange mirrors inside tube forming triangular prism
Place colored beads at one end
Look through other end and observe multiple reflections
Record patterns and angles of reflections
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Connects multiple reflections to creative applications
activities_projects.evaluation: Functional kaleidoscope with observable patterns (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Lensless Shadow and Light Mapping
activities_projects.objective: Analyze how light spreads around edges and obstacles
steps: Shine torch on object from different distances
Observe penumbra and umbra regions
Measure width of shadow gradient
Explain effect of distance and source size
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands penumbra, umbra, and light diffraction at edges
activities_projects.evaluation: Accurate observation, measurement, and explanation (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Advanced Quiz on Reflection and Shadows
steps: Prepare five questions involving calculations, angles, and image types
Prepare five real-life application or reasoning questions
Exchange with a friend and solve analytically
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Strengthens analytical and applied understanding of chapter
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality and correctness of solutions (10 marks)
